title: River Pollution Impact Visualizer
description: An interactive limnology simulation visualizing real-time river pollution effects. Features a HTML5 Canvas river ecosystem with boid-behavior fish, swaying flora, and diffusing contaminant plumes (industrial, sewage, plastic). Coupled biochemical engine models DO/BOD/toxicity dynamics — fish die at DO < 4.0 mg/L, plants shrivel from toxicity. Includes spill deployment, micro-filter cleanup, and full ecosystem purge/restore. Pure vanilla JavaScript.
